title: uragoga johnsonii
side_effects: Uragoga johnsonii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing excessive sweating, vomiting, and stomach cramps in some individuals. In severe cases, overconsumption of the plant may lead to dehydration, dizziness, and even heart palpitations. Long-term misuse of uragoga johnsonii may also contribute to kidney damage, as it can act as a diuretic and increase urine production. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using uragoga johnsonii or any other herbal remedy to avoid these potential side effects.
